data.headline: Find Your NYC Loft.
data.body: I close deals fast, skip the fluff, and make renting or buying in New York actually simple.

items.title: Market Analysis
items.description: Know your neighborhood. I'll break down pricing trends, comp data, and what your place is actually worth.

items.title: Expert Negotiation
items.description: I've saved buyers tens of thousands. I know when to push and when to walk.

items.title: Loft Hunting
items.description: Tell me what you want. I'll find it — Williamsburg, Bushwick, LES, you name it.

items.title: Investment Advice
items.description: Cap rates, cash flow, upside potential. Whether it's your first unit or your fifth.

items.title: Full-Service Closing
items.description: From offer to keys. I handle the paperwork, the timeline, and the headaches.

steps.title: Tell Me What You Need
steps.description: Quick call or form — tell me your budget, timeline, and what matters most.

steps.title: Get Your Report
steps.description: I'll send you a custom market analysis within 24 hours. No obligation.

steps.title: Let's Do This
steps.description: Ready to move? I'll handle everything from offer to closing. Let's go.

items.text: Kai found us the perfect loft in Williamsburg in two weeks. We'd been looking for six months before we called him.
Super easy process, no BS. He told us exactly what to offer, we got it under asking. Done.
Negotiated $40k off asking price on our Bushwick place. Kai is the real deal.

data.title: What's Your Place Worth?
data.subtitle: Free market analysis in minutes.
data.description: Thinking about selling or just curious? I'll send you a **free** breakdown of your home's value based on real comps — no strings attached.

data.title: About Kai
data.bio: I'm Kai Nakamura — Brooklyn-based, NYC-obsessed real estate agent with 6 years and 200+ deals under my belt. I work with buyers, sellers, and investors across Williamsburg, Greenpoint, Bushwick, and the Lower East Side. My job is simple: get you the best deal, with as little stress as possible. No hype, no fluff — just results.

thank_you.title: Got it — I'll be in touch!
thank_you.body: Thanks for reaching out. I'll have your market analysis ready within 24 hours. Keep an eye on your inbox.
